environment_prompt: A clean, well-lit home kitchen interior. A stainless steel gas stove with six black control knobs sits at center. A spice rack stands to the left, a wooden cutting board to the right. Behind the stove, a kitchen window lets in warm afternoon sunlight. Granite countertops, tidy surfaces. A stainless steel kettle sits on the front burner with a blue gas flame underneath. The kettle has a spout facing slightly to the right and a lid on top.
perspective_prompt: First-person view, eye-level, looking straight ahead at the gas stove. The viewer's hands rest on the counter edge at the bottom of the frame.

interactions.action: Turn off the gas stove knob with the right hand.
The flame goes out and steam fades.
